emergency_definition: customer reports smoke smell near alarm panel

emergency_routing_rules.fallback_if_no_answer: Client: Route to our operations manager, Thomas, at 404-555-0156. If still no answer, collect info and tell them we'll respond within 15 minutes.

integration_constraints: Do not automatically create tickets or jobs in servicetrade
Do not create any tickets or jobs in servicetrade
after_hours_flow_summary: Greet caller, confirm emergency status, collect name/phone/address if emergency, attempt transfer to on-call contact, fallback to callback promise if transfer fails; for non-emergency collect details and promise next-business-day follow-up.
office_hours_flow_summary: Greet caller, ask purpose, collect name and phone number, route or transfer to appropriate team, fallback if transfer fails, confirm next steps, offer anything else, close call.
notes: Extracted from demo call transcript: demo_005.txt | ONBOARDING NOTES: Clara must never confirm alarm receipt or dispatch to callers. | For non-emergency calls during business hours, offer to connect to customer service team.
